name: huo15-openclaw-mit-48h-learning-method
description: 火一五 MIT 48 小时学习法 - 基于 NotebookLM 的 Ihtesham Ali 三问框架 + 反馈循环 + 完整 48h 时间线
auth_note: 首次使用需运行：nlm login（浏览器交互式登录）

mental_models.ihtesham_original: What are the 5 core mental models that every expert in this field shares?
mental_models.description: 领域内专家共享的 5 个核心心智模型

disagreements.ihtesham_original: Show me the 3 places where experts in this field fundamentally disagree, and what each side's strongest argument is.
disagreements.description: 专家根本不同意的 3 个核心问题（含 steelman）

probing_questions.ihtesham_original: Generate 10 questions that would expose whether someone deeply understands this subject versus someone who just memorized facts.
probing_questions.description: 区分真懂和假背的 10 个暴露性问题

followup.ihtesham_original: Explain why this is wrong and what I'm missing.
followup.description: 反馈循环：错答时诊断盲点 + 生成追击问题

phase_2.name: 主动回忆 + 反馈循环

phase_3.name: 综合 + 模拟考 + 多模态巩固

author: 青岛火一五信息科技有限公司
